code.description: Invite code from the invite email / link.

checks.description: List of checks. Each returns { authorized, missing_permissions }.

token.description: JWT to verify and authorize against each check.

permissions.description: Permissions for this check; ALL must be held.

permission.description: Single permission to check, e.g. 'user.read'. Use this OR `permissions`.

permissions.description: Multiple permissions; the token must hold ALL of them.

client_secret.description: M2M client secret (issued at client creation, never returned again).

grant_type.description: OAuth grant type. Only 'client_credentials' is supported.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to revoke. The matching session is destroyed; the access token continues to verify until its TTL expires.
Refresh token returned from signin/signup/previous refresh. Each refresh rotates the token; the previous one is revoked.

email.description: EndUser's email address. Always returns 201 (no enumeration); if the address exists, a reset code is emailed.

newPassword.description: New password. Must satisfy the app-configured policy.

token.description: The 6-character code from the password-reset email.

displayName.description: Optional display name shown back to the user.

email.description: EndUser email address. Used for verification + reset.

password.description: Password. Must satisfy the app-configured policy (default: 8+ chars).

username.description: Unique username inside the app. 3+ chars.

access_token.description: Short-lived JWT signed with the app-scoped JWKS key. Carries sub, role, permissions[], type=end_user.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived opaque-ish JWT used to mint a new access token via /auth/refresh. Rotated on use.

name.description: Human-readable label for this key (shown in the API keys list).

permissions.description: Permission scope for the key. Each entry must match `resource.action` (lowercase + underscores).

displayName.description: Display name shown in the console.

slug.description: URL-friendly app slug (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens).

email.description: Optional invitee email. If set, the invite is locked to that address.

expiresInHours.description: Hours until the invite expires. Defaults to 168 (7 days).

maxUses.description: Maximum number of times this invite can be accepted. Defaults to 1.

role.description: Role slug to grant on accept (e.g. `admin`, `member`).

deviceInfo.description: Optional device fingerprint stored on the resulting session (UA, IP class, etc.).

grant.description: The opaque grant returned from the IdP callback.

deviceInfo.description: Optional device fingerprint stored on the resulting session.

idToken.description: OIDC ID token from the IdP.

mode.description: `login` to sign in (or sign up if new), `link` to attach the IdP identity to an already-signed-in account.

permissions.description: Array of permission strings in resource.action format
Permission strings in resource.action format to assign as scopes

mode.description: `login` to sign in (or sign up if new), `link` to attach the IdP identity to an already-signed-in account.

pkceChallenge.description: PKCE code challenge (S256). Required for public clients; optional for confidential clients.

redirectUri.description: URL the IdP should redirect back to after the user authenticates. Must be a localhost URL or a productcraft.co subdomain.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to the app

maxFailedLoginAttempts.description: Failed-login attempts before the EndUser account is locked.

maxSessions.description: Maximum concurrent sessions per EndUser. Oldest is evicted on overflow.

passwordRequireUppercase.description: Require an uppercase letter in passwords.

sessionDurationMinutes.description: Session lifetime in minutes (1 minute to 30 days).

signinEnabled.description: Whether existing EndUsers can sign in.

signupAllowedEmailDomains.description: Optional allowlist of email domains for signup. Empty array = any domain.

signupEnabled.description: Whether new EndUsers can sign up.

roleName.description: Name of the role to assign

displayName.description: New display name. Pass an empty string to clear it; omit to leave unchanged.

token.description: EndUser or M2M JWT to verify against the app JWKS.

info.description: Multi-tenant authentication for ProductCraft customers. The Consumer API (`/{appSlug}/v1/*`) is what external apps integrate to sign in their EndUsers; the Heimdall-admin Platform API (`/v1/*`) is for managing the Heimdall apps themselves and is signed in via PlatformUser tokens.
info.title: Heimdall API

get.summary: List apps the current PlatformUser is a member of

post.summary: Create a new Heimdall app owned by the caller
Accept an app invite by code

404.description: App not found or caller is not a member.

patch.summary: Update app display name and metadata

get.summary: List API keys for an app (no raw secret).

post.summary: Mint a new hdk_live_* API key with an explicit permission scope. The raw key is returned ONCE.

200.description: Page of audit entries with `next_cursor` and `has_more`.

404.description: App not found or caller is not a member.

get.summary: Append-only audit log for this app. Filter by `?action=` and/or `?actor_id=`. 50/page (max 200), cursor-paginated.
Get the per-app auth config (signup, signin, password policy, sessions).

patch.summary: Update the per-app auth config. Only fields you pass are changed.

201.description: M2M client created. Plaintext secret is returned ONCE in this response.

403.description: Caller email not verified, or lacks `m2m.create`.

404.description: App not found or caller is not a member.
M2M client not found in this app.

200.description: New secret generated and returned ONCE.

404.description: M2M client not found in this app.

put.summary: Set scopes for an M2M client

400.description: Validation failure or unknown role slug.

403.description: Caller email not verified, or lacks `role.assign`.

404.description: App not found or caller is not a member.

get.summary: List app members (PlatformUser view of EndUser memberships)

delete.summary: Remove a member from the app

get.summary: List all roles in an app

post.summary: Assign a role to a user

404.description: App not found or caller is not a member.

get.description: Returns total apps the caller belongs to, end-users across those apps, and active API keys across those apps. Single round-trip; cheap. Powers the workspace Dashboard hero stats.
get.summary: Aggregate counts for the signed-in PlatformUser

post.description: Destroys the session that owns the refresh token. The matching access token continues to verify until its TTL expires.
Rotates the refresh token on every call — the previous refresh token is revoked, and re-using it triggers session revocation.
post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token

post.description: Always returns 201 to prevent account enumeration. If the email matches an EndUser, a 6-character reset code is sent.
Consumes the reset code (single-use). On success the password is updated and the user can sign in immediately.
post.summary: Submit a reset code + new password

post.description: Authenticate with username-or-email + password. Returns a fresh access + refresh token pair on success.

Create an EndUser account inside the app and immediately mint a session. Subject to the app-configured signup policy (signup enabled, password policy, default role). When the app sets `signup_requires_pak: true`, the request must carry an `Authorization: Bearer <pcft_live_*>` PAK with the `heimdall.signup.create` permission — public unauthenticated signup is rejected with 401.
Returns `{ authorized: boolean }`. Pass `permission` (string) for a single check, or `permissions` (array) when ALL must be held.
post.summary: Verify a token + check one or more permissions

post.description: Runs N permission checks against the same token in one call. Each result reports the missing permissions (if any). Useful when a UI needs to flag many actions at once.
post.summary: Multi-permission authorization in a single round-trip

delete.description: Removes the EndUser, all sessions, and all related records inside this app. Cannot be undone.
delete.summary: Permanently delete the signed-in EndUser account

get.description: Returns the EndUser identity, app membership, and effective permissions for the bearer token.

patch.description: Currently only the display name can be changed.

get.description: Login events, password changes, and other security-relevant records, scoped to this EndUser.
Each session includes a `current` flag identifying the one belonging to the bearer token used for this request.
get.summary: List all active sessions for the EndUser

delete.description: Sign the EndUser out of one device. The session’s refresh token is destroyed; its access token expires on its TTL.

post.description: Standard OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant. Returns an app-scoped access token whose `permissions` claim is the union of the client's configured scopes. Use for service-to-service calls.
post.summary: Exchange client_credentials for an access token

post.description: Validates the JWT against the app's JWKS keys and returns `{ valid, principal }`. Use this when you need the full claims; use `/authorize` for a yes/no permission check.
post.summary: Verify a token signature + return its principal
